# Keep TX Red

> Conservative Texas political news, election coverage, legislative tracking, and taxpayer tools — including a property tax calculator by county with school district rates.

Keep TX Red is an independent Texas news site covering state politics, elections, the Legislature, and the issues that matter to Texas conservatives. We publish evergreen explainers on how Texas government works alongside daily news coverage.

## News & Coverage

- [Latest News](/news): Daily Texas political news and analysis.
- [Elections](/elections): Texas election coverage and candidate ratings.
- [County Elections](/county-elections): County-level race tracking.
- [Candidate Guides](/candidate-guides): Conservative scorecards on Texas candidates.
- [Legislative Updates](/legislative-updates): Bills and votes from the Texas Capitol.

## Voter Tools

- [Find Your Representative](/find-representative): Look up your Texas state and federal reps.
- [Register to Vote](/register-to-vote): How to register to vote in Texas.
- [Contact Legislators](/contact-legislators): Reach your Texas legislators.
- [Voting Locations](/voting-locations): Find polling places in Texas.
- [Get Involved](/get-involved): Ways to engage in Texas politics.

## Taxpayer Tools

- [Texas Property Tax Calculator](/tax-calculator): Estimate property tax by Texas county, including school district rates.

## Reference

- [Texas Representatives](/representatives): U.S. senators, statewide leaders, House delegation.
- [Texas Laws](/texas-laws): Major Texas statutes explained.
- [Laws You Should Know](/laws-to-know): Plain-English guides to key Texas laws.
- [Laws Explained](/laws): Deep-dive explainers on Texas law.
- [Glossary](/glossary): Texas political terminology, A–Z.

## About

- [About](/about): Who we are.
- [Editorial Standards](/editorial-standards): Our mission, accuracy standards, and AI usage policy.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch, send tips, or report a correction.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
